summary: Revenue from surplus goods sales tracks closely with DCAS's vehicle auto-auctions, which make up most of the total. Fiscal 2023's jump came from a mayoral fleet-reduction initiative that auctioned off far more surplus vehicles; Fiscal 2024 and Fiscal 2025's declines followed because the City replaced fewer older vehicles amid spending reductions, leaving fewer vehicles to auction.

sources.label: DCAS, Fiscal 2026 Preliminary Mayor's Management Report
